title: Spanish Omelette with Crispy Potato
description: A Spanish-inspired omelette filled with crispy potatoes and a rustic twist.

ingredients.name: Optional: 1/2 cup crushed Spanish cheese (such as Manchego)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced potatoes and cook until they are crispy and golden brown.
In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and season with salt and pepper.
Add the toasted bread cubes to the bowl and mix to combine.
Add the cooked potatoes to the bowl and mix to combine.
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and cook until the edges start to set.
Use a spatula to gently fold the omelette in half.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the eggs are cooked through.
Slide the omelette onto a plate and serve hot.
Optional: Sprinkle with crushed Spanish cheese and serve.
